product_overview: Grapadi Strategix is a web application for Indonesian SMBs to create business plans, manage finances, generate AI-driven forecasts, and export professional PDF reports with an affiliate and Pro subscription system.
core_goals: Enable entrepreneurs to create comprehensive business plans with modular CRUD sub-sections
Provide financial management tools (transactions, summaries, projections) with charts and exportable reports
Offer AI-powered financial forecasting and insights based on simulation data
Support PDF export flows with Pro subscription (watermark-free) and SingaPay payments
Provide affiliate/referral tracking and admin user management

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users with username and password to access the protected dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/login -> Fill username field (e.g., pandu123) -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> Redirect to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> See dashboard
Navigate to /grapadistrategix/login -> Fill username field -> Fill incorrect password -> Click Login button -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new user account using name, username, phone (WhatsApp), and password, then continue to OTP verification.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/register -> Fill name field -> Fill username field -> Fill phone/WhatsApp field (628xxx format) -> Fill password field -> Fill confirm password field -> Optionally enter referral code -> Click register button -> Redirect to /grapadistrategix/verify-otp -> See prompt to enter 6-digit OTP
Navigate to /grapadistrategix/register -> Fill phone field with invalid format -> Fill other required fields -> Click register button -> See validation errors for phone format

features.name: OTP Verification
features.description: Verify phone ownership via a 6-digit OTP sent over WhatsApp (Fonnte) for registration and password reset flows.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/verify-otp -> Enter 6-digit OTP code -> Click verify button -> On success token issued -> Redirect to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> See dashboard
Navigate to /grapadistrategix/verify-otp -> Enter incorrect 6-digit OTP code -> Click verify button -> See error message and option to Click resend OTP button

features.name: Forgot Password
features.description: Request a password reset OTP via WhatsApp using a registered phone number.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/forgot-password -> Enter phone number -> Click Send OTP button -> See success message instructing to check WhatsApp
Navigate to /grapadistrategix/forgot-password -> Enter unregistered phone number -> Click Send OTP button -> See error message indicating phone not found

features.name: Reset Password
features.description: Reset account password by providing the reset OTP and new password.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/reset-password -> Enter OTP code -> Enter new password -> Enter confirm password -> Click submit button -> See success message and ability to Login at /grapadistrategix/login
Navigate to /grapadistrategix/reset-password -> Enter expired OTP code -> Enter new password -> Click submit button -> See error message about invalid or expired OTP

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Protected main dashboard showing summary stat cards, quick actions and recent plans, and serving as entrypoint to all modules.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> See stat cards with module summaries -> Click quick action card for Business Background -> Dashboard updates activeSection to Business Background and shows list
Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard while unauthenticated -> See redirect to /grapadistrategix/login

features.name: Business Background CRUD
features.description: Create, view, edit and delete business background entries including image uploads and descriptive fields.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Business Background in sidebar or quick actions -> View list of business backgrounds -> Click Tambah (Add) button -> Fill business name field -> Select category field -> Fill description field -> Upload logo file -> Click Save button -> See new business background in list

Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Business Background in sidebar -> Click Tambah (Add) button -> Leave required fields empty -> Click Save button -> See validation error messages for required fields

features.name: Market Analysis CRUD
features.description: Manage market analyses with TAM/SAM/SOM, SWOT, competitors, and interactive charts.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Market Analysis in sidebar -> Click Tambah to create new -> Fill target market field -> Fill market size fields (TAM/SAM/SOM) -> Add competitor entries -> Click Save -> See new market analysis in list and pie chart reflecting market share

Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Market Analysis in sidebar -> Click Tambah -> Enter inconsistent TAM/SAM/SOM values -> Click Calculate Market Size -> See error or validation message indicating inconsistent market size values

features.name: Product & Service CRUD
features.description: Add and manage products or services with images, pricing and optional AI-generated BMC alignment.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Product Service in sidebar -> Click Tambah to add new -> Select type 'product' -> Fill name and description -> Fill price -> Upload product image -> Click Save -> See product listed

Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Product Service in sidebar -> Open existing product -> Click Generate BMC alignment -> See AI generation in progress -> See generated BMC fields populated -> Click Save
Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Product Service in sidebar -> Click Tambah -> Leave price empty -> Click Save -> See validation error indicating price is required

features.name: Financial Simulation
features.description: Create and manage income/expense transactions, view cash flow summaries and monthly comparison charts.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Financial Simulation in sidebar -> View transaction list and charts -> Click Add new transaction -> Select category -> Fill amount field -> Select date -> Toggle recurring if needed -> Click Save -> See transaction in list and updated cash flow summary

Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Financial Simulation in sidebar -> Click Add new transaction -> Enter negative amount or invalid date -> Click Save -> See validation error and transaction not saved

features.name: Financial Summary
features.description: Generate monthly P&L, cash flow and balance sheet summaries from simulation data and export them.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Financial Summary in sidebar -> Click Generate summary from simulation data -> Confirm generation -> See generated summary listed with monthly comparison charts

Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Financial Summary in sidebar -> Click Generate summary but no simulation data exists -> See warning message that there is insufficient data to generate a summary

features.name: AI Financial Forecast
features.description: Create forecast datasets, import simulation data and generate ARIMA-based forecast results with charts and insights.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Forecast in sidebar -> Click Create forecast data -> Enter year and income/expense values -> Click Save -> Click Generate AI forecast -> Wait for results -> See forecast charts and insights

Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Forecast in sidebar -> Click Generate AI forecast with insufficient or single-year data -> See error or warning indicating more historical data is required

features.name: Affiliate System
features.description: Manage affiliate link, view referral statistics, edit slug and request commission withdrawals.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Affiliate in sidebar -> View affiliate link and stats -> Click Edit slug -> Enter new slug -> Click Save -> See updated affiliate link

Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Affiliate in sidebar -> Click Request withdrawal -> Enter withdrawal details -> Click Submit -> See success message and withdrawal appearing in history

Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Affiliate in sidebar -> Click Request withdrawal with balance below minimum -> Click Submit -> See error message about insufficient withdrawable balance

features.name: PDF Export (Business Plan & Financial Report)
features.description: Export combined business plan and financial reports to PDF; free users receive a watermark and Pro users receive watermark-free PDFs.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Export PDF in sidebar -> Select export type 'Business Plan' -> Click Generate PDF button -> If user has Pro access then PDF generation starts and PDF downloads -> See success notification

Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Export PDF in sidebar -> Select export type 'Financial Report' -> Click Generate PDF button -> If user is Free then Pro payment modal appears prompting upgrade -> User cancels modal -> See PDF generation aborted and watermark information displayed

features.name: Pro Subscription Payment
features.description: Purchase Pro subscription via SingaPay (VA or QRIS) to remove PDF watermark and enable Pro features.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click upgrade to Pro -> Select package (monthly or yearly) -> Choose payment method (VA or QRIS) -> Submit purchase -> Poll payment status until confirmed -> On success redirect to /grapadistrategix/payment/success -> See Pro badge in header and PDF access enabled

Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click upgrade to Pro -> Select package -> Start payment when SingaPay credentials are misconfigured in non-mock mode -> Payment fails to initialize -> See error message and option to retry or switch to mock/sandbox mode

features.name: User Profile
features.description: View and edit personal profile information, upload profile photo and change password.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click profile icon in header -> See profile info (name, username, phone, role) -> Click edit -> Update name and phone -> Upload profile photo -> Click Save -> See updated profile details
Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click profile icon -> Click edit -> Enter phone in wrong format (not 628xxx) -> Click Save -> See validation error for phone format

features.name: Admin Dashboard & User Management
features.description: Admin-only analytics, user search/filter/sort and user status/role management.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/login -> Login as admin (username: admin) -> Redirect to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click Admin Dashboard subsection -> See admin stats cards and registration trend chart -> Click User Management -> Search for a user -> Open user detail modal -> Change user status to banned -> See confirmation
Navigate to /grapadistrategix/login -> Login as admin -> Open User Management -> Attempt to demote self from admin role -> Click Save -> See prevention error and no role change

features.name: Dark Mode Toggle
features.description: Toggle UI theme between light and dark; preference is persisted in localStorage and applied across pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click sun/moon icon in header -> Theme switches between light and dark -> Reload page -> See same theme applied from localStorage

Navigate to /grapadistrategix/dashboard -> Click sun/moon icon when browser blocks access to localStorage -> Theme switches visually -> Reload page -> See theme reverted to system preference and a notice that preference could not be persisted

features.name: Public Landing Page
features.description: Marketing landing page with hero, feature highlights, pricing preview, testimonials and WhatsApp floating widget.
user_flows: Navigate to /grapadistrategix/ -> See hero section with CTA buttons -> Click Register CTA -> Redirect to /grapadistrategix/register

Navigate to /grapadistrategix/ -> Click WhatsApp floating widget -> WhatsApp chat opens (external) -> If Fonnte API key missing for OTP flows, registration still proceeds but OTP sending will fail in dev

routes.description: Public landing page with hero, features, pricing, testimonials
Login page with username and password
Registration page with name, username, phone, password
OTP verification page, 6-digit code via WhatsApp
Forgot password page, enter phone to get OTP
Reset password with OTP and new password
Main dashboard with state-based navigation for all modules

known_limitations.issue: Financial Plan module routes are disabled in backend API
known_limitations.impact: 9 frontend components exist but cannot communicate with API

known_limitations.issue: WhatsApp OTP requires valid Fonnte API key
known_limitations.impact: OTP verification will fail without real API key in dev
Pro payment flow non-functional without real keys (use mock mode)
All routes must be prefixed with /grapadistrategix/
